description_blurb:
The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set.

Narrative Description: The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a simplified central crosshair. Two small, dark, elongated objects are visible near the center of the frame in the upper right quadrant.This narrative description is provided for informational purposes only. Readers should not interpret any part of this description as reflecting an analytical judgment, investigative conclusion, or factual determination regarding the described event’s validity, nature, or significance.
title: FBI Photo B22
summary: The Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) submitted a report of an unidentified anomalous phenomenon (UAP) to the All-domain Anomaly Resolution Office (AARO) consisting of a still image derived from a U.S. military system in 2025. The original imagery was altered with redactions before being submitted to AARO. An accompanying mission report was not provided. The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP. The date in the image is incorrect due to system date/time not being set. The monochrome image displays a grainy texture with a simplified central crosshair. Two small, dark, elongated objects are visible near the center of the frame in the upper right quadrant.
reported_object_description: Two small, dark, elongated objects; a small, dark, blurry object
official_resolution: The operator reported that they were unable to positively identify the UAP.
bust_reasoning: The document consists solely of a single, low-quality, grainy, black-and-white photograph showing a small, blurry, dark object. There is no accompanying narrative, kinematics, or corroborating sensor data or witnesses beyond the implied 'operator' of the camera. This complete lack of detail and poor image quality makes any definitive assessment impossible and strongly points towards a mundane explanation, aligning with the highest bust score range.
full_text:
# FBI Photo B22 - Page 1

[redacted]

[redacted] [redacted]
[redacted] [redacted]
[redacted] [redacted]

[Image: A grainy, black-and-white surveillance-style photograph featuring a crosshair overlay centered on a small, dark, blurry object. The number "3" appears on the horizontal axis of the crosshair.]

12/31/99 18:19:19
cover_up_reasoning: The document begins with several '[redacted]' blocks, indicating that significant contextual information, potentially including details about the incident, the operator, or the purpose of the photo, has been withheld. This goes beyond simple name redaction and suggests a deliberate effort to obscure the full context of the image.
summary_zh: 联邦调查局（FBI）于2025年向全域异常解决办公室（AARO）提交了一份关于未识别异常现象（UAP）的报告，该报告包含一张源自美国军事系统的静止图像。原始图像在提交给AARO之前经过编辑，部分内容被遮盖。未提供随附任务报告。操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。由于系统日期/时间未设置，图像中的日期不正确。该单色图像显示出颗粒感纹理和简化的中心十字线。在画面中心右上象限可见两个小型、黑暗、细长的物体。
reported_object_description_zh: 两个小型、黑暗、细长的物体；一个小型、黑暗、模糊的物体
official_resolution_zh: 操作员报告称无法明确识别该UAP。
bust_reasoning_zh: 该文件仅包含一张低质量、颗粒感强烈的黑白照片，显示一个小型、模糊、黑暗的物体。除相机“操作员”外，没有随附的叙述、运动学数据、佐证传感器数据或目击者。这种细节的完全缺失和图像质量不佳使得任何明确的评估都无法进行，并强烈指向一个平淡无奇的解释，符合最高的“破解”评分范围。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件开头有多个“[已遮盖]”区块，表明重要的背景信息（可能包括事件、操作员或照片用途的详细信息）已被扣留。这超出了简单的姓名遮盖，暗示了蓄意模糊图像完整背景的努力。
claims: FBI submitted a UAP report to AARO in 2025
Report consists of a still image from a U.S. military system
Original imagery was altered with redactions
Accompanying mission report was not provided
Operator was unable to positively identify the UAP
The date in the image (12/31/99) is incorrect due to system date/time not being set
claims_zh: 联邦调查局于2025年向AARO提交了一份UAP报告
报告包含一张来自美国军事系统的静止图像
原始图像经过编辑，部分内容被遮盖
操作员无法明确识别该UAP
图像中的日期（12/31/99）不正确，因为系统日期/时间未设置
bust_explanations: Bird, bat, or insect at close range, appearing blurry due to motion or focus issues.
Lens flare or camera artifact, given the grainy, black-and-white, surveillance-style image quality.
Distant aircraft or drone, appearing small and blurry due to distance and image resolution.
bust_explanations_zh: 近距离的鸟类、蝙蝠或昆虫，因运动或对焦问题而显得模糊。
考虑到图像的颗粒感、黑白和监控风格的质量，可能是镜头眩光或相机伪影。
远距离的飞机或无人机，因距离和图像分辨率而显得小型和模糊。
cover_up_indicators: Multiple '[redacted]' blocks at the beginning of the document
cover_up_indicators_zh: 文件开头有多个“[已遮盖]”区块
